══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:7+6=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:20+6=26 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Archmage (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
